scripts.start: npm run compile:electron && run-p start:angular start:electron-serve
scripts.start:local: npm run compile && npm --prefix electron run start:local
scripts.compile: npm run compile:angular && npm run compile:electron
scripts.start:electron-serve: wait-on tcp:4200 && npm --prefix electron run start:serve
scripts.start:electron-local: npm run compile:angular && npm --prefix electron run start:local
scripts.predebug: npm run predebug:angular && npm run predebug:electron
scripts.test: npm --prefix angular run test:run && npm --prefix electron run test
scripts.test:all: npm --prefix angular run test:run && npm --prefix electron run test && npm run e2e
